message:
Add comprehensive edge case tests for toolchain detection

Expand test coverage for toolchain detection module with tests for:

Channel Parsing Edge Cases:
- beta channel without date
- two-digit version numbers (1.75)
- unknown/custom channel formats
- nightly with invalid date suffix

Date Validation:
- boundary dates (2000-01-01, 2099-12-31)
- invalid formats (empty, partial, wrong separators)
- alternate date orderings

Version Number Validation:
- edge versions (0.0.1, 99.99.99)
- invalid formats (single digit, trailing dot, too many parts)

Rustc Version Parsing:
- edge case date formats
- beta.N versioning
- minimal nightly format
- invalid/non-rustc output

TOML File Parsing:
- files with components and targets arrays
- files with profile field
- invalid TOML syntax (graceful fallback)
- missing channel field (graceful fallback)

Legacy File Parsing:
- extra whitespace handling
- empty file (graceful fallback)

ToolchainInfo Struct:
- Display trait via rustup_toolchain()
- equality with differing full_version
- is_nightly/is_stable/is_beta predicates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
